message:
🐛 Fix deploy events showing pod stdout instead of K8s events

The GetDeployLogs handler fell back to pod stdout when Kubernetes
events had expired (~1 hour TTL). This showed misleading output like
nginx worker process notices in the Deploy Events section.

- Remove pod stdout fallback from deploy-logs endpoint — only return
  Kubernetes events (empty array if none)
- Show "No recent events" for completed missions instead of
  "Waiting for events..." when K8s events have expired

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
